ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Disconnect
ast.target: 断开连接

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Connect
ast.target: 连接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stop evolving this profile. Future exports will create new fingerprints.
ast.target: 停止演进此配置文件。未来的导出将创建新的指纹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste the code from your profile's manage page.
ast.target: 请粘贴您配置文件管理页面中的代码。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disconnect
ast.target: 断开连接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Connection code
ast.target: 连接代码

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: e.g. YWJjMTIzOnh4eHg…
ast.target: 例如 YWJjMTIzOnh4eHg…

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Connect the plugin to an existing Rodin profile to evolve it with new writing — merging fresh themes, questions, and models into your existing fingerprint instead of creating a new one each time.
ast.target: 将插件连接到现有的 Rodin 配置文件，以便用新的写作内容演进它——将新的主题、问题和模型合并到您现有的指纹中，而不是每次都创建一个新的。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No markdown files found in vault.
ast.target: 在保险库中未找到 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to export to Rodin. Check your internet connection.
ast.target: 导出到 Rodin 失败。请检查您的互联网连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rodin rate limit reached. Please try again in an hour.
ast.target: 已达到 Rodin 速率限制。请在一小时后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Not connected. Paste a connection code in plugin settings.
ast.target: 未连接。请在插件设置中粘贴连接代码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Connection expired. Reconnect in plugin settings.
ast.target: 连接已过期。请在插件设置中重新连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rodin rate limit reached. Try again in 15 minutes.
ast.target: 已达到 Rodin 速率限制。请在 15 分钟后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Disconnected from Rodin profile.
ast.target: 已断开与 Rodin 配置文件的连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste a connection code first.
ast.target: 请先粘贴连接代码。

ast.name: cls
ast.source: modal-button-container rodin-export-buttons
ast.target: modal-button-container rodin-export-buttons

ast.name: error
ast.source: That doesn't look like a valid connection code.
ast.target: 这看起来不像一个有效的连接代码。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Connection code is invalid or has expired.
ast.target: 连接代码无效或已过期。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not reach Rodin. Check your internet connection.
ast.target: 无法连接到 Rodin。请检查您的互联网连接。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Export vault to Rodin
ast.target: 将保险库导出到 Rodin

ast.name: text
ast.source: Cancel
ast.target: 取消

ast.name: text
ast.source: Get your connection code at rodin.fyi/p/[your-id]/manage.
ast.target: 请在 rodin.fyi/p/[your-id]/manage 获取您的连接代码。
